metadata.description: Four-step empirical pipeline: MC estimator validation, rolling AR(1) recovery rates, CSD anticipation test, panel regression, hazard model

examples.input: Pipeline summary: Monte Carlo estimator validation + CSD anticipation + panel regression + hazard model
